headline: 1 Stock Under $50 to Target This Week and 2 We Ignore
summary: The $10-50 price range often includes mid-sized businesses with proven track records and plenty of growth runway ahead. They also usually carry less risk than penny stocks, though they’re not immune to volatility as many lack the scale advantages of their larger peers.

raw.headline: 1 Stock Under $50 to Target This Week and 2 We Ignore

headline: Texas Instruments Acquisition Resets Capex Path And Free Cash Flow Outlook
summary: Texas Instruments (NasdaqGS:TXN) has completed its US$7.5b acquisition of Silicon Labs, marking a major portfolio and scale change for the analog and embedded processing business. The company has also reduced its 2026 capital expenditure guidance, with management pointing to improved free cash flow and significant cost synergies tied to the integration. These moves represent a new phase for NasdaqGS:TXN, separate from recent product launch news, with implications for its cost base, product...

headline: Meet the Next Generation of Dividend Aristocrats
summary: These six companies have paid out a higher dividend for at least 15 straight years, bolstering the case for owing them.
